# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

# Elasticsearch Snapshot Configuration

# Define the snapshot repository settings
snapshot_repository:
  type: s3 # Change to 'fs' if using file system
  settings:
    bucket: "your-s3-bucket-name" # Required for S3
    base_path: "elasticsearch-backups" # Optional, specify a directory within the bucket/file share
    compress: true # Compress the backup files

# Snapshot creation policy
snapshot_creation_policy:
  schedule: "0 2 * * *" # Run daily at 2 AM
  retention_policy:
    expire_after_days: 30 # Retain backups for 30 days
    max_backup_count: 10 # Keep a maximum of 10 backups

# Snapshot restoration settings
restoration_settings:
  target_cluster: "target-cluster-name" # Name of the cluster to restore to
  index_patterns: ["index-pattern-*"] # Patterns of indices to restore

# Security settings (optional, depending on your S3 configuration)
security:
  access_key: "your-access-key"
  secret_key: "your-secret-key"
  region: "us-east-1" # Your AWS region

# Notifications (optional, for alerting and logging purposes)
notifications:
  enabled: true
  notification_type: "email"
  recipients: ["admin@example.com"]
